subcodes.first_line: O Ali! Hearken unto the call of thy Lord, the Most Exalted, the Most High, from the direction of the Throne, that it may draw thee unto the sanctified abode [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا علی اسمع ندآء ربک العلی الاعلی عن جهه العرش لیجذبک الی مقر القدس و
subcodes.subjects: @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
